WorkIntro.title: How we work
WorkIntro.defaultOverview: We act as your outsourced marketing department. From strategy and Google Ads to professional video production and web development – we take full responsibility for your digital growth.
WorkIntro.defaultBackground: We often see businesses with great products but no cohesive strategy. We bring everything together – design, content, advertising, and technology – into one integrated machine that actually converts.

jonk.heading: Full Campaign for Jønk
paragraphs: For Jønk we deliver a complete visual campaign, from cinematic 4K ads to a large library of high-end product photos.
Everything designed to capture the raw energy and urban identity that defines the Jønk brand.

page.title: High-Energy Campaign Delivery
page.description: A cemented part of Jønk's marketing team since the launch of Burgerkrigen.
page.backgroundBody: We came in as an external unit on Jønk's marketing team during one of Norway's biggest marketing campaigns. The engagement was defined to begin with. Today we're a cemented part of the team and work on everything visual and strategic that actually reaches the customer.
page.campaignBody: Burgerkrigen is a head-to-head competition between Oskar Westerlin and Mathea Bjørndalen where the audience picks the winner. We deliver everything visual, everything physical, and all the tracking that makes it possible to measure what actually works.
page.spiritDesc: Punchy, fast-paced content we produced to capture the raw energy of the kitchen and the crunch of the perfect smash burger.
page.photoDesc: We deliver a large library of edgy product shots and posters designed for social media, print, and digital menus, all keeping the urban Jønk identity front and center.
page.scopeIntro: What you've seen above is one piece of the delivery. As a cemented part of Jønk's marketing team we work across everything visual, physical and measurable:
scopeItems: Sidewalk signs, rollups, flyers and press walls
Product video and product photography in full production
page.strategyDesc: Focusing on raw materials, high heat, and textures. We highlight the crunch and clean flavors, communicating quality through a high-energy delivery that matches Jønk's edgy vibe.
page.deliverablesDesc: A high-performance library of cinematic 4K social ads and high-resolution photos tailored for maximum engagement on Reels and TikTok.
page.resultsBody: In April 2026 alone, the social channels we manage for Jønk have generated over 400,000 views on TikTok and Instagram. Just as important: Jønk is still an active client, and there are no plans for that to change.
page.resultsStatLabel: views on TikTok and Instagram, April 2026
page.ctaTitle: Want the same depth in your marketing?
page.ctaBody: We take clients through the full pipeline, from strategy and campaign to production and daily publishing. Tell us where you are and we'll figure out how we can help.

fcr.heading: Fighter Promo for FCR
paragraphs: We produced an intense promo video for MMA fighter Tamerlan Akhmadov under FCR – Full Contact Rumble, a UFC subsidiary in Sweden.
The film captures the raw intensity of the sport and was designed to build hype around the fighter and the event.

page.title: Raw MMA Promo
page.description: We were brought in to create the introduction video for Tamerlan Akhmadov, a young rising MMA fighter ahead of his bout under FCR (Full Contact Rumble) in Sweden.
page.backgroundBody: Tamerlan Akhmadov is a young MMA fighter on the rise on the international scene. He came to us because he wanted to be seen as a serious player going into his next fight. He didn't need a standard fighter portrait. He needed a professional introduction video that matched his ambitions.
page.videoDesc: A quiet but intense introduction that lets the training and the fighter speak for themselves. Editing, lighting and sound design are built around Tamerlan's own request for a completely music-free production.
page.approachIntro: We took full ownership of the production. We wrote the script, filmed at his own training space and at outdoor locations, and edited everything ourselves.
page.approachKeyBody: Tamerlan didn't want any music in the video. Not even as background. Most agencies would have tried to talk him out of it, because music is the easiest tool to build mood. We did the opposite. We took his idea and built the production around it. Breath, footsteps on the mat, gloves hitting pads. The result is a video that feels real because it isn't hiding behind a soundtrack.
page.strategyDesc: We conveyed Tamerlan's dedication and focus without resorting to clichés. We let the sound of training, breath and movement carry the film. It feels real because it is real.
page.deliverablesDesc: A finished introduction video ready for social media and event marketing, delivered in every format needed.
page.resultsBody: When the card was announced his fight became one of the most anticipated of the entire event. He went in as the heavy favorite and won in style. Just as important: he has already reached out to continue the collaboration with more videos and photoshoots ahead of upcoming fights.
page.ctaTitle: Need something in the same style?
page.ctaBody: We take on projects for sport, brand and individuals who want something that doesn't look like everything else. Describe your idea and you'll hear from us.

snatched.heading: Promo Video for Snatched
paragraphs: For Snatched, a fast-growing Norwegian shapewear brand, we delivered a pitch video with 3D modeling and animated infographics for their next investment round.
The video visualizes sales volume as a physical warehouse, making scale concrete instead of abstract.

page.title: Visual Storytelling with 3D
page.description: Snatched asked us to create a pitch video for their next investment round. The goal was to show the size of the company visually, without just throwing numbers on a screen.
page.backgroundBody: Snatched is a fast-growing Norwegian shapewear brand preparing for their next investment round. They came to us because they wanted a top-quality video that could secure maximum attention and capital in the pitch process. They wanted 3D, infographics and motion graphics at a level that matched their ambitions.
page.approachBody: We could easily have thrown big numbers on a screen and called it a day. Instead we built the sales figures as a physical warehouse. 3D-modeled cardboard boxes, pallets and packages filling the screen in step with the revenue Snatched has actually delivered. It visualizes scale in a way numbers alone never can, and it sticks in an investor's head.
page.videoDesc: A high-end pitch video combining live-action, 3D-modeled warehouse visualizations and animated infographics to communicate the size and momentum of Snatched.
page.strategyDesc: We visualized the sales volume as a physical warehouse. 3D-modeled boxes, pallets and packages stack up in step with the numbers, making scale concrete instead of abstract.
workItems: 3D modeling of warehouse, pallets and packages
page.deliverablesDesc: A finished pitch video tailored for investor presentations and digital distribution, delivered in every format needed.
page.resultsBody: Snatched were very happy with the delivery after a thorough revision process where we fine-tuned every scene together with their team. The video is now in their hands and being used in the ongoing investment round. We're waiting to see how it lands with investors.
page.ctaTitle: Need a video that actually convinces?
page.ctaBody: We take on pitch videos, product videos and content that requires above-average production value. Describe the project and you'll hear from us.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to what you're wondering about.

timeline.a: A simple website can be ready in 1–2 weeks. Larger projects with filming and ads typically take 3–6 weeks.

cost.a: The price depends on what you need. We always give you a clear quote after a no-obligation call, no hidden costs.

changes.q: Can I make changes along the way?
changes.a: Yes! We work with close dialogue and include revision rounds in all projects. You see the work as it progresses.

support.q: Do I get help after launch?
support.a: Absolutely. We offer maintenance agreements and are always available for updates and support.

tech.a: Book a no-obligation call so we can understand your needs. Then you'll receive a clear proposal with pricing, timeline and deliverables.
